title: Once a Year It Does Not Hurt
original_title: Uno al año no hace daño
overview: It tells the story of a university student who makes a documentary to find out if Colombia is a country of drinkers or not. In the midst of everyday and comic situations, the young man will obtain interesting and entertaining material for his research.
